mano_cua.result_summary: 页面上Tags Input组件有Basic和Custom Validation两个演示区域，基本功能正常（输入标签按Enter成功添加并保留，多次添加均持续显示）。但页面上没有包含form表单和Svelte store绑定的专门演示区域，无法测试bug描述的特定场景（form内使用store时标签添加后立即消失）。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Tags Input basic and custom validation demos work correctly - tags are added and retained. However, no form/Svelte store binding demo exists on the page, so the specific bug scenario (tags disappearing inside form with store binding) cannot be tested.
